_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 heterozygous mice recapitulate the anthropometric and metabolic features of human neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: the cell density in subcutaneous fat depots from Nf1 +/− mice was increased over two-fold while cross-sectional area was reduced two-fold when compared with WT mice
details: Cell density in subcutaneous fat increased over two-fold while cross-sectional area reduced two-fold compared to WT mice
